summary: Testing BLOCK C - HR/Attendance/Payroll Improvements. Employee Detail Page with calendar/projects/attendance/payroll tabs. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Fixed bug: payslips in dashboard endpoint missing period_start/period_end fields. Frontend: All features working - employee detail page loads correctly with all 4 tabs, clickable employee rows navigate to detail page, calendar month navigation works.

minor.issue: Does not return 404 for unknown user - returns empty data instead. Inconsistent with /dashboard endpoint behavior.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Bug in GET /api/employees/{id}/dashboard - payslips missing period_start/period_end fields. The MongoDB projection was fetching fields that don't exist on payslips collection (they're on payroll_runs). Fixed by enriching payslips with period info from related payroll_run.
GET /api/employees/{id}/dashboard - Returns employee, profile, attendance (30 days), project_history (with days_present, total_hours, last_attendance), hours_summary, payslips (5 recent)
GET /api/employees/{id}/calendar - Returns calendar days with attendance + work reports by day, supports ?month=YYYY-MM parameter for navigation
Frontend EmployeeDetailPage uses 4 tabs: calendar (default), projects, attendance, payroll - all working correctly
Frontend EmployeesPage rows are clickable with cursor-pointer class and navigate to /employees/{id}
seed_data_creation: Using existing tech1 user (6f69367a-e25f-489d-a7c8-f25cde6a9ac5) with Daily 120 lv/day profile, 1 project (PRJ-002), attendance on 2026-02-17
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK C Employee Detail Page fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/employees/{id}/dashboard (employee with profile, attendance, project_history, hours_summary, payslips), GET /api/employees/{id}/calendar?month=YYYY-MM (calendar with attendance/work_reports by day). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_employee_detail.py. Bug fixed: payslips in dashboard now include period_start/period_end from related payroll_run.

GET /api/employees/{id}/dashboard return.notes: Returns all required fields with proper structure

GET /api/employees/{id}/calendar returns.notes: Returns days array with attendance status, work_reports, total_hours per day

Project history shows days_present, tota.notes: Each project in history has project_code, project_name, days_present, total_hours, last_attendance

Frontend: /employees/{id} page loads wit.notes: Header shows name (John Worker), role badge (Technician), email. Pay info bar shows type (Daily), rate (120 лв/ден), hours/day (8ч), active status

Frontend: Calendar tab shows month grid.notes: Calendar grid displays days, month navigation buttons work, shows presence highlighting and hours per day

Frontend: Projects tab shows project his.notes: Table shows project code, name, role, status, days present, hours, last attendance

Frontend: Attendance tab shows recent at.notes: Table shows date, status (Присъства/Present), project, note

Frontend: Payroll tab shows recent paysl.notes: Shows period, gross pay, net pay, status. 'Към Заплати' link present

Frontend: EmployeesPage rows are clickab.notes: Rows have cursor-pointer class, clicking navigates to /employees/{id}

Frontend: Hours summary shown in header.notes: Shows current month days/hours and total projects count in header

bug_fix_applied.description: Fixed payslips in dashboard endpoint missing period_start/period_end. Original code tried to project these fields from payslips collection where they don't exist. Fixed by enriching payslips with period info from related payroll_run document.
bug_fix_applied.impact: Payroll tab in Employee Detail Page now shows period dates instead of dashes

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - All endpoints use real backend with MongoDB
